_comment: Cairn module federation registry. Each entry is a business module Cairn polls for a live snapshot. Snapshot endpoint must return markdown (text/plain or text/markdown) or JSON {module, snapshot_md, generated_at}. Auth: set auth_header_env to an env var name; its value is passed as Bearer token. Set enabled=false to pause without removing.

modules.name: manufacture
modules.notes: Open orders, stock by marketplace, in-flight production, last-N FBA shipments. See D:/manufacture/backend/core/cairn_views.py
